description_long: This advertising board consists of three large, freestanding display panels arranged side by side on a wooden platform. The left panel features a high-resolution image of sushi with the text 'SUSHI & SAKE', while the right panel displays a vibrant photo of a Japanese dish with red chopsticks. The central panel is narrower and showcases a promotional poster for 'JUNE MONTHLY SPECIALS', including menu items and delivery information. Two cylindrical black podiums or stands are positioned in front of the panels, likely for promotional materials or interaction. A human figure stands in the center, providing a sense of scale and suggesting the board's use in a public or commercial setting. The overall design is sleek, with smooth, rounded panel edges and a professional, visually engaging appearance.
description: A three-panel freestanding advertising board with vivid food imagery and a central promotional poster, set on a wooden platform with two black podiums in front.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three display panels, the central promotional poster, two black podiums, and a person standing in the middle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile of the panels and the depth of the wooden platform, with podiums and the person visible in alignment.
description_view_2: Direct head-on view of the three panels, clearly displaying the sushi, promotional, and Japanese dish graphics without obstructions.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the slimness of the panels and the arrangement of podiums and the person from the other side.
attribute_frame_design: frameless panels with rounded corners and thin metal supports at the base
attribute_advertisement_content: static printed posters and high-resolution food photography for a Japanese restaurant, including menu specials and delivery information
